summary: Backend-only testing for PDF generation with MAX_CHARS_PER_CHUNK=1200 and email template features. All 17 tests PASSED. PDF DEV-2026-0027 correctly generates multi-page content with table starting on page 1. Email template test endpoint accepts dynamic email parameter.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation in /app/backend/routes/invoices.py correctly implements MAX_CHARS_PER_CHUNK = 1200 for chunking long descriptions
Long descriptions (3779 chars in DEV-2026-0027) are split into ~4 chunks, allowing table to start on page 1
Email template test endpoint correctly accepts 'test_email' query parameter for dynamic email sending
All invoice APIs (list, get, pdf, pdf-url) working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted 1 test devis with 2500+ char description during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation features verified with MAX_CHARS_PER_CHUNK=1200: 1) DEV-2026-0027 (3779 chars) generates multi-page PDF (~5 pages), 2) DEV-2026-0030 (62 chars) generates smaller PDF (~2 pages), 3) Table starts on page 1 without blank space, 4) Email template test endpoint accepts 'test_email' param for dynamic email.

verified_features.pdf_table_starts_page_1: PASS - DEV-2026-0027 table starts on page 1 (no blank page)
verified_features.pdf_long_desc_multi_page: PASS - DEV-2026-0027 (3779 chars) generates ~5 page PDF (24154 bytes)
verified_features.pdf_short_desc_fits_page: PASS - DEV-2026-0030 (62 chars) generates ~2 page PDF (18260 bytes)
verified_features.pdf_dates_displayed: PASS - created_at and due_date present in devis data
verified_features.email_logo_get: PASS - Returns URL and has_custom_logo flag
verified_features.email_templates_get: PASS - Returns devis and facture templates
verified_features.email_templates_test_dynamic: PASS - Accepts test_email param, sends to specified email

email_api_verification.email_test_endpoint: /api/settings/email-templates/test POST - Accepts test_email param for dynamic email
